prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（原理科）最低录取位次分别为约661名→986名→1574名→3847名→4739名，呈持续大幅后移趋势，近4年累计后移约4078名；2025年基准位次约4 739名；该校在陕物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为9人、9人、9人、12人、14人，2026年扩招至20人，较2025年增长约42.9%，扩招幅度较大，预计将明 显拉低录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第35位，近年排名稳定在33–35位区间，属顶尖财经类院校；2026年高考周期声誉数据中无该校明显正面或负面事件；抖音综合热度排名第99位（一般），短视频曝光量处于中游水平；近年无投档断档记录；第 五轮学科评估中，统计学获评A-，应用经济学、工商管理获评A+，理论经济学获评A；物理类招生专业中的统计学类、数学类与优势学科高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算 机类、电子信息/通信等理工科专业2024年社会热度为"高热推荐"，统计学/数学类为"推荐"，整体理工科报考热度较高；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增 长约19.7%，竞争显著加剧；该校位于上海市，地域吸引力强；物 理类招生专业含数据科学与大数据技术、计算机科学与技术等前沿方向，契合当前就业热点。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划扩招（+42.9%）是位次后移的主要驱动 因素，同时本省物理类考生大幅增长约19.7%及理工科专业整体热度上升对位次有上推作用。，考虑考生规模扩大和专业热度的竞争加剧效应，小 幅修正后预测最低录取位次约5857名，波动区间5357–6357名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学（金融学、数字与智能金融）
- 经济学（含数量经济、双学士学位）
- 会计学（ACCA）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 统计学类（经济统计学、统计学实验班、数据科学）
- 保险学（智能精算与大数据）
- 会计学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 数据科学与大数据技术
- 数学类（信息与计算科学、数学与应用数学）
- 计算机科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5357–6357名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如5300名以内）可重点冲击金融学、经济学等财经王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如6300名附近）建议优先选择统计学类、数据科学等热度高且与优势学科关联紧密的专业，并确保数学类等三档专业保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Physics Category (formerly Science) were approximately 661 → 986 → 1574 → 3847 → 4739, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 4078 places over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4,739; the enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shaanxi from 2021 to 2025 was 9, 9, 9, 12, and 14 students respectively, and in 2026 it will expand to 20 students, an increase of about 42.9% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that is expected to significantly lower the admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 35th in the 2026 main list of Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities, with stable rankings in the 33–35 range in recent years, making it a top-tier finance and economics institution; there are no significant positive or negative events for this university in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation data; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 99th (average), with short video exposure at a mid-level; no recent records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Statistics was rated A-, Applied Economics and Business Administration were rated A+, and Theoretical Economics was rated A; the Statistics and Mathematics categories in the Physics Category admissions are highly correlated with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, computer-related, electronic information/communication and other science and engineering majors had a social popularity rating of 'highly recommended', while statistics/mathematics were 'recommended', indicating overall high popularity for science and engineering majors; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal; the Physics Category admissions include frontier directions such as Data Science and Big Data Technology, and Computer Science and Technology, aligning with current employment hotspots.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (+42.9%) as the main driver for ranking decline, along with a significant increase of about 19.7% in the number of Physics Category examinees in the province and the overall rise in popularity of science and engineering majors pushing rankings upward, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking is about 5,857, with a fluctuation range of 5,357–6,357.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Finance (Finance, Digital and Intelligent Finance)
- Economics (including Quantitative Economics, Double Degree)
- Accounting (ACCA).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Statistics (Economic Statistics, Statistics Experimental Class, Data Science)
- Insurance (Intelligent Actuarial and Big Data)
- Accounting.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Mathematics (Information and Computing Science, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics)
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5,357–6,357, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5,300), you can prioritize top finance and economics majors like Finance and Economics; if your ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 6,300), it is advisable to choose majors like Statistics and Data Science, which are highly popular and closely related to the university's advantageous disciplines, and ensure Tier 3 majors like Mathematics as a backup.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) were approximately 160 → 216 → 201 → 309 → 314, showing a fluctuating and declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 113 places in the last three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 314; the enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 8, 8, 8, 9, and 9 students respectively, with a significant expansion to 17 students in 2026, an increase of about 88.9% compared to 2025, which is expected to significantly lower the admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with a stable ranking range of 33–35 in recent years, making it a top-tier finance and economics institution; there were no significant positive or negative events related to this university in the 2026 college entrance examination cycle reputation data; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 99th (average), with short video exposure at a mid-level, showing no significant popularity fluctuations; there have been no records of admission interruptions in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics and Business Administration received A+, Theoretical Economics received A, and Statistics received A-, placing its finance and economics disciplines among the top in the country, maintaining a strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/accounting/economics majors in 2024 is described as 'differentiated and wait-and-see,' overall stable; the number of History Category examinees in this province in 2026 is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Shanghai, with strong regional appeal, providing a cross-province application preference bonus for Shaanxi examinees; local enrollment proportion data is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 History Category enrollment plan (+88.9%) as the main driver for ranking decline, along with the approximately 17% increase in the number of History Category examinees in the province and the strong appeal of the university's top finance and economics disciplines, which exert some upward pressure on rankings, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum admission ranking is about 452, with a fluctuation range of 352–552.
